历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (physics category) were approximately 1454 → 994 → 497 → 1044 → 331, showing a fluctuating downward trend (decreasing ranking numbers). In the last two years, it significantly moved forward from 1044 to 331, with a baseline of about 331 in 2025. The enrollment plan for this university in Inner Mongolia's science (physics category) was 79 in 2021, 73 each from 2022 to 2024, 69 in 2025, and 65 in 2026, a reduction of 4 students (about -5.8%) compared to 2025, slightly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings has steadily risen from 15th in 2021 to 11th in 2026, firmly among the top-tier science and engineering universities in China. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is 'significantly negative,' mainly due to the Yang Yun incident of teacher misconduct and academic fraud, which has attracted public attention. Its Douyin popularity ranks 56th (relatively hot), with positive exposure from topics like 'National Defense Seven Sons.' No signs of admission anomalies have been recorded in historical data. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, it has 16 disciplines rated A- or above: Aerospace Science and Technology A+, Computer Science and Technology A+, Software Engineering A+, Materials Science and Engineering A+, Instrument Science and Technology A+, Biomedical Engineering A+, Management Science and Engineering A+, Control Science and Engineering A, Information and Communication Engineering A, Mechanical Engineering A, Foreign Language and Literature A, Transportation Engineering A-, Mechanics A-, Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics A-, Optical Engineering A-, and Mathematics A-, highly matching the various engineering experimental class majors of the university.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Core majors at Beihang, such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering, continue to be highly recommended. In 2026, the total number of college entrance exam takers in Inner Mongolia is about 154,000, a significant increase of about 32% from 2025 (approximately 116,360). The estimated number of physics category takers is about 112,420 (+34%), with the expanded candidate pool intensifying competition. Beihang is located in Beijing, not a local university in Inner Mongolia. Its enrollment proportion in Inner Mongolia is very small (about 1.3% in 2025), typical of cross-provincial enrollment, with no significant regional preference factors.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 331, a 5.8% enrollment reduction in 2026, a significant increase of about 34% in local physics category candidates (intensifying competition), negative reputation events (slightly suppressing popularity), and the university's top-tier status (continuously attracting high-scoring students), the combined effect of enrollment reduction and candidate increase points to intensified competition, but the university's top-tier appeal to high-scoring students remains strong, with limited impact from reputation negatives. The predicted minimum ranking for science in 2026 is about 339, with a range of 289–389.

Candidates with rankings within 289 are advised to focus on Tier 1 flagship majors (Computer Top Talent, Future Aerospace Leading, etc.); those with rankings between 289 and 339 should prioritize Tier 2 with Tier 1 as a supplement; those between 339 and 389 should focus on Tier 3 with Tier 2 as a stretch; candidates near or slightly below 389 may consider Tier 3 majors as a safety option. All engineering experimental classes at Beihang correspond to A-level disciplines, offering extremely high overall application value.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts (history category) were approximately 1041 → 254 → 420 → 232 → 190, showing a significant forward trend (ranking numbers greatly decreasing). Over the past 5 years, it jumped from 1041 to 190, with competition intensifying. The baseline for 2025 is about 190. The university's enrollment plan for liberal arts (history category) in Inner Mongolia was 7 students each year from 2021 to 2024, 9 students in 2025, and 9 students in 2026. The plan remains unchanged from 2025 to 2026, with no expansion or reduction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; ranked 11th nationally by Soft Science (2026), belonging to the top-tier university level. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is 'clearly negative' (Yang Yun incident), but it mainly involves issues with science and engineering advisors, with relatively limited impact on the psychology of liberal arts applicants. Douyin popularity ranks 56th (relatively hot). No abnormal liberal arts admission records have been seen. Beihang's Foreign Language and Literature is rated A, Law (covered by the Social Science Experimental Class, Beihang Law not separately rated but relies on the university platform), and Management Science and Engineering A+ indirectly support the quality of liberal arts majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The Social Science Experimental Class covers Economics, Administrative Management, Law, etc.: Law has a relatively hot social popularity (recommended), Economics is divided and wait-and-see. In 2026, the estimated number of history category examinees in Inner Mongolia is about 41,580 (an increase of about 27% from 32,644 in 2025), with the expanded examinee pool intensifying competition. Beihang is located in Beijing, not a local university. Its liberal arts enrollment in Inner Mongolia is extremely small, so regional preference factors are not significant.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 190, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, a significant increase of about 27% in local history category examinees (intensifying competition), the top-tier university level (continuously attracting high-scoring students), and the limited impact of the reputation negative event, the main source of competitive pressure is the surge in examinees. However, Beihang's liberal arts only offer one major, the Social Science Experimental Class, with a very small enrollment (9 students), leading to greater ranking fluctuation elasticity. The predicted 2026 liberal arts minimum ranking is about 205, with a range of 155–255.
